title: Gender parity over time
detail: Gender parity has improved by 0.10 points between 2015 and 2026.

title: Platform diversity gap
detail: Disney Plus leads on diversity (0.74) while Apple Tv trails (0.69).

title: Genre lead-role skew
detail: Action has the highest male lead share at 74% of lead roles.

title: Dialogue gap by genre
detail: In thriller, female characters average 27% fewer dialogue words than male characters.

title: Intersectional representation
detail: Women of color hold 13% of lead roles across the dataset.

title: Interaction homophily
detail: Gender homophily in interaction networks is -0.08 (positive values mean characters interact mostly within their own group).
